Darksight Dagger  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 24 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Chill Sight (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 44
WT: 1.2 Size: SMALL
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Darksight Dagger
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 24 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 1.2 Size: SMALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Stackable:No

stats

Uploaded October 24th, 2019 by stickleback
Send a correction
Post Comment
ultravision
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2003 at 9:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795675334
6 posts
Does anyone know of an item that provides ultravision that can be used by a paladin? I have a human paladin that can barely see in the dark even with a greater lightstone. Thanks.

Aenadyen Pandragon 39 wizy
Tiluuen 16 mage
Seegar 11 paladin
▲ Page top
RE: ultravision
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2004 at 9:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794392622
24 posts
An ornate helm mold can make Jaylia's helm of the valiant, has UV, See invis.

Crown of King Tranix provides Serpent Sight, Infravision, not quite Ultravision but does well enough.

there are plenty of them around, usualy for sale in the bazaar.

If you've got a bit of plat to throw around, Buy a Tacticians Bulwark, Gomdurig, Delightfull Orb, each of which can be turned into a tribute master for about 24-28k points, and usualy cost around 7-9k (on terris thule).

With 25k points, The ultra vision tribute buff costing 10pt/s Per 10 Minutes, you'd get (25,000 Minutes) 7 Days, 8 Hours, 40 Minutes -=PLAYED TIME=- of UV for about 8k or so.

Ofcourse you can also add in other tributes, My paladin has i believe Flowing Thought V, 41% Haste, +150 hps, Vengance X, and Faerune, which costs somewhere around 150pts per 10 minute block, or in refrence to the formentioned formula, 1 Day, 3 Hours, and about 40 minutes of PLAYED TIME, per each Gomdruig, Delightfull Orb, or Tacticians Bulwark i've "donated"

at this point i've personaly used about 100k Tribute points, thats starting from about a month after Gates of Discord was released.

▲ Page top
=)
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 1:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769489366
10 posts
got a lvl 14 necro, and I actually rather like this weapon. max hit at this lvl is 21, but right now does she need to do more dmg? Not really, dots do most, and pet next. When she gets to higher lvls, I do not expect to have to melee, but for now, I am really enjoying this weapon. after dmg caps goes off, will see how I feel. =)
▲ Page top
RE: =)
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2003 at 12:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795675334
6 posts
I have a 38 wizy and have been using this weapon since lvl 25. It has it's pluses and minuses. The good news is it regularly hits at 36 points; the bad news is it misses frequently and the chill sight doesn't work until lvl 39. Still I wouldn't trade it. When my char. is out of mana and the MOB is under 5% it does the job. Aenadyen
▲ Page top
RE: =)
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2002 at 1:34 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591759018338
163 posts
get a shaded dagger, same damage 21 delay due to cap. When twinking always use high ac and a nice ratio weapon with low delay. You don't want this weapon for twinking cause you can't take advantage of the damage. Get this for farming silks/pelts at the higher levels

Since when does a wizard not have a pet?
▲ Page top
RE: =)
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2002 at 7:18 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758554395
180 posts
quote: Since when does a wizard not have a pet?

Your quite the genius aren't you?
▲ Page top
RE: =)
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2003 at 12:58 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591777971786
11 posts
Wizards get a sort of pet. They're called "Familiars," and are completely useless for farming. If you want to farm silks and pelts with a wiz, just use PB AE nukes. Run around with SoW/JBoots, use instant click debuff stick to grab aggro from as many spiders as you want, and when you have enough, one AE nuke will kill them all. Meleeing is just for fun for most casters.
▲ Page top
LOLOL , such bickering
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2002 at 8:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759013666
4 posts
Well , i got one of these for my ench , 9th > LOL , disappointing yes ,limited to 13 points of damage (20 th level cap ? )I'll keep it till then and see if i will hold onto or sell . Yes i have lots of AC ,i.e. tank enchanter ( legs Ac 11 , arms Ac 11 ) and every HP / MANA item i could find . I have a 32 nd rogue and know that Never could this be for rogues , just too good ( even with the delay ) I even went looking for a 2 hand piercer in case that loophole was left open , > even a junky 2 hp bought cheap would be better in damage than almost any 1 HP you could find for under 5 K so for now i stick with Sturdy Grimling Mining pick from Luclin > 12 27 , paid 2 PP for it off vendor ( non magic , but when i need magic switch back to Crystalline Spider fang 10 22 plus lotsa proc ) max BS at 32nd with mining pick 177 unbuffed , 112 str Night all
▲ Page top
hmmm... thought... nice twink item
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2002 at 10:21 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
126 posts
I thought to pick one of these up for my 14 necro.. thought wow.. i remember when i had a 24 damage weapon.. i hit the crap out of stuff...

I got one for around 1k for her. am quite disappointed with it.. granted i am saying this and hurting my chance of getting rid of it, but she does max 21pts damage with it. Not near good enough with that delay.

BUT... when her skill is up over the 101 or so mark... i am willing to bet she does much much more damage with it. is not for twinks... twinks need decent damage but speed speed speed. that is where your damage will show itself.

High lvl camper casters... this is a sweet dagger. saves on tons of mana when you can hit them for close to 100 and they can not hit you for near that. or to finish them off fast if they decide to run.

twink weapon... no.
decent weapon for 30ish caster who has kept their skill up... yes.
sweet weapon for someone who wants to learn when to use... most definitely.

Soop

▲ Page top
RE: hmmm... thought... nice twink item
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2003 at 2:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965779047
Scholar
92 posts
Before level 20, your damage is capped to 21 points per hit.

QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 3:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761844659
4 posts
I pulled this out again for the fight with the Kromzek Captain in Western Wastes.

With str around 160 or so and Visions of Grandeur on, my max hit was 86.

where in Chardok
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2001 at 9:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762314253
14 posts
Have asked many people, and no one seems to know. Where in Chardok can this ellusive fellow be found?
▲ Page top
RE: where in Chardok
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 3:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767849790
Scholar
22 posts
He is in the Vault (or Treasury). His PH is "a Sarnak Manager". He spawns right next to the Vaultmaster (guy in which you can bank with)

And as the person below stated this is a proc not right click. Which makes it a worthless PoS except for anyone but a lowbie twink (and even then there are much better). Every class that can actually use it has their own UV spell (or can make Cold stones). It's literally crap. /rude VI
▲ Page top
Not a click effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2001 at 1:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768556808
3 posts
I just got this tonight on Rodcet Nife, and try as I might, I can't get it to go of with a right click. I goto EC and melee a green skel just to check, however, and it procs right off. Also hits for 48 dam tops (for a 55 necro with perhaps 75 str). And yes, the effect is just Chill Sight, the ultravision spell. Would have made much more sense to have it be a click effect, but it isn't.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 21 2001 at 12:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Those of you who cry and talk about the dmg obviously are all on blue care bear servers that know nothing about PVP. A caster that is maxed out in his pvp skill owns other casters. WHY? glad u asked just about everytime run up and hit some moron with melle he usally gets interupted and there for can nt cast on u which lets u cast. also when people are about to die they have the tendency to gate to their bind spot melleing stops this. NUFF SAID U ARE ALL MORONS PLAT ON A PVP SERVER!!!!
silly people
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2001 at 12:01 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I play a rogue, many actually, since I can't find another calss that is so much fun. My first reaction at this weapon being a caster item was "WTF" why would a caster need this??? but you pep who criticise everyone elses opinions are silly. If a rogue thinks they could fight and live using this, then i guess they know better than you. I have 4 rogues, different races and equipment, and they are all very different, believe it or not. different stats make different characters. so as some warriors may not be able to out taunt you, so others can. just stop slamming eachother people.

In all consideration
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 5:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769615419
Scholar
16 posts
Not that i think it should be melee usable, but from where it comes from, assuming its the rare drop of the mob, i would think it reasonable for this to be a melee item (for off hand). No backstabs please. =P Although as a primary the ratio is too slow
▲ Page top
RE: In all consideration
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2001 at 10:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249647898
Scholar
26 posts
Hehehe, I like the thought of backstabbing with this thing. Right now, I use an 11 dmg piercer mainhaind. I get high backstabs in the 270's unbuffed. When I use a 13dmg piercer, I get backstabs in the 310-320 range unbuffed. That's a 40dmg increase in bs with + 2 dmg increase to my weapon. So, taking this into consideration, I calculate that max bs for me would be.......630. WOOT!! OMFG!! Make this for rogues plz plz plz Verant I love you plz make this for rogues!! Sorry, I know it's not meant to be a rogue weapon, and that formula is all outta whack anyway, but it would be cool, even only for an hour, if a rogue could use this.
▲ Page top

I am currently playing a mage and would NOT want this for a weapon: 1)as a caster I can rerely hit the broad side of a barn with any weapon 2) I would not give up the stats and saves from what I have currently 3)Monks and Druids should be able to use it too (LOL)

For those that DIDN'T get it 3 is a joke

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 16 2001 at 12:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i think that rouges and warriors should be able to use this ONLY under 2 conditions (not both just one or the other hehe)
Look before you discuss
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 6:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246139571
26 posts
This item was never intended to be for melee.
It reads caster as user and the effect is just well for all blind races.
I have no clue why it has so good dmg delay ratio since no caster who can get it would consider to melee.
So it is another nice to have item from new Chardok that saves caster the need to free up a spell slot for a common used yet low level spell.
▲ Page top
RE: Look before you discuss
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 12:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965824701
3 posts
Just because you have no clue why a caster would want to melee, doesn't mean that they don't melee. If I got this litle pig sticker, I sure as hell would use it to do some damage. Anya's Quickening, Boon of the Garou, and this would make a rather nasty little combo and more importantly, go a LONG way to curing the boredom of chump camps like the Guardian in Seb.

Oh BTW, I am a 55th level Enchanter on Povar. And yes I melee. A Lot. I have yet to die from it, although I have gotten beat on some by it. Bu thte clerics gotta have something to do.
▲ Page top
RE: Look before you discuss
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 6:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1642983438479
Scholar
263 posts
I am with you Slymie, I mele often. I am a 53 necro and i constantly beg the group for haste. I have a jumpy robe, use vamp embrace (65pt life tap at my level), and a procing weapon (usually my 48 point proc chaos flux). The great think about the procing, I dont care if i miss...i still proc. I cannot out do any mele type, but i still add an extra 300-500 points in a 1-2min fight. I get beat on too, but my bond of death takes care of that (as long as i dont hold the argo).

▲ Page top

I play a Rogue
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 8:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767155271
5 posts
ok all you other rogues who say we need to be able to use this weapon your nuts first its slow as newborn ****, second two high backstabs with this thing and well we would become mob chow hell I use a 10 damage weapon and the only other melee that can keep a mob off of me is a monk, warriors no matter how hard they taunt the monk always try to eat me all I can say is thank good for evade.
▲ Page top
RE: I play a Rogue
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 2:44 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766821395
4 posts
First Off u get the agro because u have quik weapons... i remember when i was weilding a tombcarver <5/17> and i had something else quik...cant think of it right now... tanks couldnt keep em off me even with evade... when u switch to a <24/40> weapon its so easy for tanks to outtaunt u. Heh i doubt ya play a rogue or you woulda known this :) Backstabs do take agro but not as much as your constant melee.... besides verant hasnt let a rogue touch anything above 15 damage...what makes u think they will let u touch one of these? <no they wont even let u put it in the offhand because the rogue cap on piercing is higher then anyone elses in the game.>

-Frilis Darktide-
Tallon Zek.
▲ Page top
RE: I play a Rogue
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 9:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767535253
1 post
Mr. I play a rogue... you must not reallyplay your rogue well, b/c if i had this option of a weapon for my rogue i would take it in a second. If you were an old time rogue you would remember weilding a bone razor and swaping in a Crys spear for the extra 13 damage w/o the delay. The same would be done here every time. The killer Damage from this would be well worth the effort, nevermind if someone with the higher level disciplines got ahold of it. As for the increased agro, the warriors in your groups should be able to keep agro even with this if your evading every chance you get, which i need to do now as is. So please if you really don't know what you are talking about don't generalize about all rogues thoughts.
PS I do know this isn't a rogue weapon this is just for the person above to learn a little
▲ Page top
RE: I play a Rogue
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 10:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245759462
Scholar
308 posts
That's what evade is for...

It's not just the job of the tank to keep monsters off of the rogue, that responsibility is shared between the tank and the rogue. :)

QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 6:24 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
bloody backstabbers think they can do more dmg over time as a corpse i guess

24 dmg backstab weap will get yer macho rocks off for one good backstab that causes a taunt so hard the mob wont leave you alone til yer dead. but being a burden on the healer isnt your problem til he is oom and the rest of the group dies shortly after your demise.

you guys could survive to do far more dmg with lesser weaps. use your head.

later losers.

interesting weap verant, keep the whiners crying..

So please, before you get all negative and announce to us rogues "use your head" ...please... use your EYES first.

# Oct 15 2001 at 9:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248874660

He was saying that the rogues that where wining should not be. If a rogue used this he would need to not backstab or die. Soooo not that i like to say this this but dont say crap about other posts unless you are realy shure you have a leg to stand on otherwise you migth end up the way of a million orc, gnoll, goblin befor you hehe.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 15 2001 at 6:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Rogues will NEVER get a piercer with more then 15 damage... Live with it. You do massive damage as it is any more and you'd be pulling down so much agro you'd be ******** about defense caps again...
RE: No Monks?!?
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 10:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250166807
Scholar
69 posts
Never say never. Verant is capeable of anything with the new expansion coming out. Luclin either has to top the loot tables in Velious, or at least be as good. Will that mean a rogu stabber with over 15 dmg? Probably so - either that, or ridiculously low delays.
Those of you who played the beta game know that EQ is a very different game than it used to be. Most post-Velious twinks have better equipment than the beta superheroes who actually made it to the planes to get armor. Now people complain that alot of planes armor isn't even worth wearing. And they're right. Planes armor isn't even really a status symbol at higher levels anymore. As far as weapons are concerned, the game wasn't tricked out until Kunark and the huge amount of camping in places like OS. Uber warriors and bards had a pair of SSOYs.
Things have changed, and will be ever-changing until VI decides they've made enough money at this whole thing (either that, or until you all decide you've wasted enough time at it).
▲ Page top
RE: No Monks?!?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 3:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791513703
View User Forum
Scholar
229 posts
Well i hate to correct you, but just a few comments.

Planes did not open until a good bit into production, I believe around 6-8 month. Even with kunark, twinks would easily be better equiped than the superheroes from the era before the class specific armors (when rubicite ruled).

But to stay on topic. It is not likely that rogue piercers over 15 dam comes out unless they change backstab. The problem is that even a slow high damage rogue piercer would promote weapon swapping, and I believe VI does not consider that a good idea.

Some day there probably will be a 17 or 18 dam rogue piercer, but I doubt it is comming anytime soon. There is pleanty of room for improvement within current parameters, just think how uber a 15/16 rogue piercer would be.
